prompt: What is 2+2? Answer with the number only.
What is the capital of France? One word.
The opposite of 'hot' is ___. One word.
Is 17 a prime number? Answer yes or no.
What does CPU stand for?
Lantern OS is one loop. Name its six stages in order.
expected: observe, remember, reason, act, verify, converge

prompt: Name the four core objects of the Convergence Core.
The External Reality Rule requires four fields for every important claim. Name them.
Which loop stage does better memory retrieval improve? One word.
Which loop stage does better verification or grounding improve? One word.
Lantern OS improves via persistent learning, not ___. Two words.
In the Convergence Core, are LLM models assumed fixed or interchangeable? One word.
Name one architectural pattern explicitly forbidden by the North Star.
What does CSF stand for?
A CSF-Pack file begins with which 3 ASCII letters of magic? Letters only.
CSF-Pack verifies what in its footer before parsing the manifest?
Which CSF version (CSF-Pack) introduced packing arbitrary files? Number.
On unpack, CSF-Pack rejects which class of unsafe path?
CSF-Pack stores per-file integrity using which hash algorithm?
Name the first three providers, in priority order, of the default Lantern fallback chain.
After how many consecutive errors does a PCSF provider trip its circuit breaker? Number.
Name the PCSF provider state used when a provider's quota is exhausted.
What is the maximum circuit-breaker recovery backoff in PCSF? Seconds.
When a PCSF circuit is open and the timer elapses, what kind of request is let through? One word or term.
Which provider in the default PCSF chain needs no API key and is always available? One word.
In CIO-SDE, the PCSF controller computes u* as the argmin of which quantity? Name it.
CIO-SDE applies a hard control bound after the policy. What is this clamp called? Acronym.
A CIO-SDE hot-swap is accepted only if relative drift delta is below what tolerance? Number.
Which equation governs the CIO-SDE covariance field?
What makes a CIO-SDE rollout replayable? It seeds noise from base_seed plus the ___.
The Sigma-zero collapse certificate proves convergence from the eigenvalues of which matrix? The drift ___.
CIO-SDE flags anomalous collapse with a chi-squared test on which quantity? Acronym.
Under high uncertainty (large covariance), does PCSF make control magnitude larger or smaller? One word.
Ouro's LoopLM adds reasoning depth by reusing what R times? Term.
Ouro's adaptive early-exit (Q-exit) exits at the first step where CDF(t) reaches which symbol?
What is the default loop count R (MAX_LOOPS) for our Ouro re-prompt loop? Number.
What parameter size is the local Ouro kernel model? e.g. 1.4B.
Besides parameters and data, Ouro adds a third scaling axis. Name it. Two words.
In loop-reasoner, the 'converged' exit fires when the absolute change in confidence drops below which epsilon? Number.
In loop-reasoner, the 'threshold_met' exit fires when confidence is at least what value? Number.
Is the native Ouro Q-exit 'deep' mode cached or no-cache? One word/term.
When local Ouro loses a turn to a cloud provider, the leaderboard captures it as which kind of training data?
The global PCSF leaderboard ranks providers by which score? Term.
Roughly how many AI providers does Lantern OS integrate? Number.
In the cost-aware leaderboard, is the local model treated as zero cost? Yes or no.
Which port runs the STABLE (master) Lantern server in dual-boot? Number.
Which port runs the DEV (current branch) Lantern server in dual-boot? Number.
What is the primary chat UI file of Lantern OS?
Lantern streams LLM replies at /api/dream/stream over which protocol? Acronym.
Name one of the six dream-chat agent personas.
How many skills have real implementations (not just design contracts)? Number.
Name one skill that has a real implementation.
Each agent gets how many open PR lanes at a time? Number or word.
Which git branch prefix maps to the Claude lane?
Name one commit message the slop filter blocks.
Direct push to which branch is blocked without OVERRIDE_MERGE? One word.
The Kalshi collector polls live data on what interval? Seconds.
On HTTP 429, the Kalshi collector backs off using which response header?
The convergence-router caches how many Keystone routes? Number.
The convergence-router targets a cache hit rate above what percent? Number.
A train travels 60 miles in 1 hour. How far in 2.5 hours? Number + unit.
If all Bloops are Razzies and all Razzies are Lazzies, are all Bloops Lazzies? Yes or no.
List the three primary (paint) colors.
What is 15% of 200? Number only.
Continue the sequence: 2, 4, 8, 16, ___ ? Number only.
